criteria.criterion: `tests/unit/metrics/test_gha_adapter.py` passes: a fixture `test.yml` coverage log yields the parsed coverage % (`assert pct == 84.2`) and two fixture runs (fail then pass) yield the expected red->green recovery duration.

`scripts/harvest_gha.py` writes the harvested coverage/CI-health as snapshots to `.rebar/metrics-snapshots.ndjson` (the tracked store), verified by a test feeding it fixture run data (adapter output stubbed/injected) and reading the snapshots back via `read_snapshots` — proving the persistence path and the correct store path (NOT `reports/`).

The portability guard holds: a unit test asserts the CORE metrics modules (`src/rebar/metrics/registry.py` and `src/rebar/metrics/__init__.py`) do not import the GHA adapter (and `_commands/metrics.py` from 9a5a is held to the same rule).
